intended_use: CardIQ Suite is a collection of non-invasive software features intended to analyze CT cardiovascular anatomy and pathology and aid in determining treatment paths.
intended_use_full: CardIQ Suite is a collection of non-invasive software features intended to analyze CT cardiovascular anatomy and pathology and aid in determining treatment paths.
target_condition: Coronary artery disease, functional parameters of the heart, heart structures, and follow-up for stent placement, bypasses and plaque imaging
ground_truth: For lumen diameter quantification, comparison to reference device CardIQ Xpress 2.0; for heart fat volume estimate, comparison using Dice score methodology
other_metrics: Heart Segmentation (non-contrast): >90% of exams successfully segmented (111 exams tested); Heart Fat Volume Estimate: Dice score ≥90% (111 exams tested); Lumen Diameter Quantification: mean absolute difference lower than mean voxel size (94 exams with 353 narrowings tested); Coronary Centerline Tracking and Labeling: enhanced performance versus predicate device
